title: Advancements Plus
body: ***POSSIBLY DISCONTINUED*** Lets be honest... Minecraft can get boring after a while, so thats why I created this mod. This mod gives you more to complete in Minecraft. There Are Currently 36 Total Advancements and More Coming! Looking For A Minecraft Server For You And Your Friends? Well Shockbyte Has You Covered. Sign Up With My Affiliate Link To Help Support Me!
